meanings.definition: a percussion instrument consisting of a pair of hollow pieces of wood or bone (usually held between the thumb and fingers) that are made to click together (as by Spanish dancers) in rhythm with the dance
rigid connective tissue that makes up the skeleton of vertebrates
the porous calcified substance from which bones are made
a shade of white the color of bleached bones
study intensively, as before an exam
examples: I had to bone up on my Latin verbs before the final exam
bone the turkey before roasting it
